items.title: Hungary alleges plot to blow up gas pipeline ahead of election
items.dek: The incident comes a week before the polls, and follow warnings of a potential operations staged to influence voters.
items.body: The incident comes a week before the polls, and follow warnings of a potential operations staged to influence voters.

items.title: Michigan's Lendeborg to play vs. UConn, May says
items.dek: Michigan coach Dusty May said that he expects star forward Yaxel Lendeborg to play in the national title game against UConn on Monday night.
items.body: Michigan coach Dusty May said that he expects star forward Yaxel Lendeborg to play in the national title game against UConn on Monday night.
